description: Capability failure error messages in polyglot AppHosts now include the resource name and a human-readable description of what went wrong (e.g., "Could not invoke 'withReference' on resource 'my-app' because parameter 'source' expects a resource with a connection string"). Type mismatch and internal errors across C# hosting are also enriched with resource names.
name: Improved error messages for polyglot and resource-scoped failures
